content.text:
Implemented the minifier fix.

What changed:
- Updated `crates/oxc_minifier/src/peephole/minimize_statements.rs`
- The single-use variable substitution logic for object literals now only treats object property keys as expressions when the property is actually computed.
- Non-computed string literal keys such as `"test-a"` no longer block traversal into the property value, so later values like `testb: o` can be inlined correctly.

Validation:
- Added a temporary regression test reproducing the reported case.
- Confirmed it failed before the fix.
- Confirmed it passed after the fix.
- Removed the temporary test as requested.
- Ran:
  - `cargo test -p oxc_minifier --test mod inline_single_use_variable::test_inline_single_use_variable`
  - `cargo fmt --check -p oxc_minifier`

Note:
- `just fmt` could not be run because `just` is not available in this environment.
- Existing unrelated working tree changes remain untouched:
  - `crates/oxc_codegen/tests/integration/snapshots/stacktrace_is_correct.snap`
  - `reports/` untracked directory.
